## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] Backend tests pass (`cd backend && .venv/bin/pytest -q`)
- [ ] Frontend type-checks and builds (`cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build`)
- [ ] Behaviour exercised in the running app (not just tests)
- [ ] No secrets committed; `.env` stays git-ignored
- [ ] New user-facing strings added to all 4 languages (AZ/EN/RU/TR)
